S.FORM: Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo I 1942 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 5 a romi'ad masofoc ci Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Equatorial guinea anini i ci Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo, patirengan a romi'ad i 1979 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 3 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: t…ôo~u…¨~…ģo~uro~u o~ub~b~viaŇč Ňčo~u~u…ôma mb~b~vaso~u*o~u i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i t…ôo~u…¨~…ģo~uro~u o~ub~b~viaŇč Ňčo~u~u…ôma mb~b~vaso~u*o~u, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …ô*o~u~uato~uria…ĺ *o~u~uin…ôa anini i ¶i t…ôo~u…¨~…ģo~uro~u o~ub~b~viaŇč Ňčo~u~u…ôma mb~b~vaso~u*o~u, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo I 1942 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 5 a romi'ad masofoc ci Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Equatorial guinea anini i ci Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo, patirengan a romi'ad i 1979 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 3 a romi'ad.
